overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Death Stranding showing a character with a large yellow-accented cargo backpack traversing a desolate, rain-soaked rocky coastal landscape. The character walks through varying terrain from enclosed rocky canyons to open foggy flats, with distant mysterious structures gradually emerging from the haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky canyon path with layered basalt walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow rocky canyon carrying a large yellow-accented cargo pack on his back

entered.detail: tall dark layered rock formation with horizontal striations
large rocky outcrop with grass at its base
clumps of dry beige grass growing between rocks
dark wet rocky terrain with small puddles reflecting the gray sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow rocky canyon with layered basalt walls on either side. Sparse dry grass grows between the dark wet rocks under an overcast sky, creating a somber, enclosed atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: open coastal flats with reflective tidal pools

events.description: exits enclosed rocky canyon into open flat coastal terrain
sunlight breaks through clouds creating bright reflections on large water puddles

agents.ego_description: traversing open wet terrain with visible sky reflections in the puddles

entered.detail: large flat puddle reflecting the bright gray sky and clouds
low rocky formations visible on the horizon
dark boulders scattered across the wet ground

segments.scene_description: The environment opens into wide coastal flats with large reflective puddles mirroring the overcast sky. The character walks across the wet rocky ground scattered with boulders as the canyon walls fall behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky approach with distant ruins emerging from mist

events.description: large distant ruined structures become visible through the haze on the horizon

agents.ego_description: approaching scattered boulders while distant fog-shrouded buildings emerge on the horizon

entered.detail: large dark rocks scattered across the path
tall blocky ruins of buildings visible through the fog in the distance
mist hovering above the wet ground reducing visibility

segments.scene_description: The character continues across the rocky terrain as large mysterious ruins become visible through the mist in the distance. The ground remains wet and dark with scattered boulders, and a low fog layer hovers above the surface.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy elevated ridge with distant coastal ruins

events.description: begins ascending a slight rocky incline
fog density increases significantly obscuring the distant structures

agents.ego_description: climbing a rocky slope as thick fog rolls in and visibility decreases

entered.detail: dense white fog reducing visibility of the landscape

segments.scene_description: The character ascends a rocky ridge as thick fog envelops the area, partially obscuring the distant ruins that now appear centered on the horizon. The terrain becomes more elevated and the atmosphere increasingly misty and mysterious.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character traverses a desolate landscape that transforms from a claustrophobic rocky canyon into an expansive, mist-shrouded coastal plain. It begins within a narrow passage of layered basalt walls and sparse dry grass under a somber, overcast sky. As the character moves forward, the canyon walls recede and the environment opens into wide coastal flats characterized by dark, wet ground and large reflective puddles. The scene then expands across the rocky terrain as mysterious ruins gradually emerge through a low-hanging layer of fog. Finally, the camera follows the character as they ascend a rocky ridge, where the atmosphere becomes increasingly misty and the distant ruins are partially obscured by a thick, enveloping haze.
